description_long: This object is a sleek, modern military jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply pointed nose. The wings are swept back and positioned low on the body, giving it an aerodynamic profile suitable for high-speed flight. The jet features twin engines mounted at the rear, emitting visible exhaust trails, and a single vertical stabilizer at the tail. The cockpit is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy situated near the front of the fuselage. The undercarriage appears to be retracted, and the surface is finished in a camouflage pattern with muted earth tones. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, maneuverability, and stealth.
description: A modern military jet airplane with swept-back low wings, twin rear engines, and a streamlined, camouflaged fuselage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, swept-back wings, and visible engine exhaust trails.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, narrow profile, and wing span with visible underwing details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the cockpit canopy and rear engine exhaust.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, single vertical stabilizer, and the full wingspan.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; wings appear to have a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, not visible in flight configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
